name: solapur-software-developers
displayName: Solapur Software Developers Directory MCP Server
description: Official read-only MCP HTTP gateway to query the verified registry database of software professionals and web developers in Solapur, Maharashtra, India. Provides tools for list filtering, detail query, and skill search.

registryMetadata.shortSummary: Query the top software developers, tech experts, and IT talents in Solapur, Maharashtra via public MCP.

toolsExposed.name: list_developers
toolsExposed.description: List developers sorted by score, supporting minRating and limit filters.

toolsExposed.name: get_developer_profile
toolsExposed.description: Deep dive profile containing notable projects and reviews.

toolsExposed.name: find_developers_by_skill
toolsExposed.description: Search profiles containing specified technical skill.
